reviewWorkloadForecast.suggestedSplit: Sequential manual checkpoints, not PRs: Phase 1 proxy test fixtures and failing tests, Phase 2 proxy contracts and downstream stdio client, Phase 3 proxy server dispatcher with policy/audit interception, Phase 4 installer wrapping and script updates, Phase 5 native MCP retirement and verification. Completed in manual phases.

workUnits.phase: Phase 1: Proxy Test Fixtures And RED Coverage
workUnits.goal: Create fake downstream MCP fixtures and failing proxy behavior tests before implementation.
workUnits.notes: Review test intent before production code: downstream tools/list passthrough, allowed call forwarding, denied call blocking, fail-closed startup/listing behavior, native tool absence, and installer secret redaction.

workUnits.phase: Phase 2: Proxy Contracts And Downstream Stdio Client
workUnits.goal: Add proxy-only contracts and one-downstream stdio MCP client lifecycle.
workUnits.notes: No native Compass tool schemas or static public registry. Contracts live separately from behavior per project type convention.

workUnits.phase: Phase 3: Proxy Dispatcher, Policy Interceptor, And Audit
workUnits.goal: Replace native routing with proxy dispatcher behavior for initialize, safe methods, tools/list, and intercepted tools/call.
workUnits.notes: All tools/call requests must classify, evaluate policy/approval, audit intent, then forward only on allow; uncertainty denies without forwarding.

workUnits.phase: Phase 4: Installer Wrapping And Runtime Scripts
workUnits.goal: Wrap one downstream MCP config behind Compass without copying secrets.
workUnits.notes: Generated/dry-run output must redact raw secrets and preserve env indirection where possible.

workUnits.phase: Phase 5: Native MCP Retirement And Final Verification
workUnits.goal: Delete or retire native registry/router/executor/contracts/tests that no longer describe active Wave 11 behavior.
workUnits.notes: Keep reusable audit/policy/env helpers only when decoupled from native MCP tool contracts.

tasks.phase: Phase 1: Proxy Test Fixtures And RED Coverage
tasks.title: Create fake downstream MCP server fixture with tools/list and tools/call behaviors
acceptanceCriteria: Fixture starts over stdio and returns deterministic downstream tool descriptors
Fixture records forwarded tools/call requests for assertions
Fixture can simulate startup, listing, and call failures

tasks.phase: Phase 1: Proxy Test Fixtures And RED Coverage
tasks.title: Add RED tests for downstream tools/list passthrough and native tool absence
acceptanceCriteria: tools/list returns fake downstream descriptors unchanged
tools/list does not expose compass_transfer, compass_swap, helper tools, or hidden internal primitives
No static Compass-owned schema mapping is required by the test

tasks.phase: Phase 1: Proxy Test Fixtures And RED Coverage
tasks.title: Add RED tests for allowed, denied, and fail-closed downstream tools/call
acceptanceCriteria: Allowed call forwards original tool name and arguments to downstream
Denied or unclassified call does not reach downstream and returns stable reason plus suggestedAction
Downstream disconnect, discovery failure, policy failure, or audit failure denies before forwarding

tasks.phase: Phase 1: Proxy Test Fixtures And RED Coverage
tasks.title: Add RED tests for installer secret-safe wrapping
acceptanceCriteria: One downstream server is wrapped behind a Compass proxy command
Raw secret env values are not written to generated config or dry-run output
Multi-downstream or remote MCP shapes are rejected as Wave 11 out of scope

tasks.phase: Phase 2: Proxy Contracts And Downstream Stdio Client
tasks.title: Create proxy-only MCP contracts separate from native tool contracts
acceptanceCriteria: Defines DownstreamMcpStdioConfig, DownstreamMcpTool, ProxiedMcpToolCall, ProxyDecision, and proxy result envelopes
Contracts do not import MCP_TOOL_NAMES, native schemas, or native result types
Types preserve one downstream stdio server per proxy process

tasks.phase: Phase 2: Proxy Contracts And Downstream Stdio Client
tasks.title: Implement downstream stdio MCP client lifecycle
acceptanceCriteria: Starts exactly one downstream MCP process using command, args, env, and cwd
Supports initialize/capability discovery, tools/list, tools/call, and shutdown cleanup
Converts startup, protocol, listing, and call failures into fail-closed proxy errors

tasks.phase: Phase 2: Proxy Contracts And Downstream Stdio Client
tasks.title: Add safe non-tool MCP method classification
acceptanceCriteria: Defines explicit allowlist for safe non-tool methods supported in Wave 11
tools/call is excluded from generic passthrough and always routes through interception
Unknown methods fail closed with stable operator guidance

tasks.phase: Phase 3: Proxy Dispatcher, Policy Interceptor, And Audit
tasks.title: Implement generic MCP tool-call policy interceptor
acceptanceCriteria: Classifies arbitrary downstream tool calls without recreating a native Compass registry
Evaluates reusable policy/approval primitives before forwarding
Returns allow or deny with reason and suggestedAction; uncertainty denies

tasks.phase: Phase 3: Proxy Dispatcher, Policy Interceptor, And Audit
tasks.title: Implement proxy audit helper for intercepted downstream calls
acceptanceCriteria: Records intent, policy decision, denial reason, forwarding attempt, downstream outcome, and failures
Redacts secret-bearing arguments and env values before audit output
Audit write failure causes fail-closed denial before forwarding

tasks.phase: Phase 3: Proxy Dispatcher, Policy Interceptor, And Audit
tasks.title: Implement proxy request dispatcher for initialize, safe methods, tools/list, and tools/call
acceptanceCriteria: tools/list returns downstream descriptors without native schema duplication
tools/call runs interceptor and audit before forwarding allowed calls
Denied, unsafe, unknown, or failed requests do not forward and return stable guidance

tasks.phase: Phase 3: Proxy Dispatcher, Policy Interceptor, And Audit
tasks.title: Refactor client-facing MCP server to use proxy dispatcher only
acceptanceCriteria: mcpServer.ts no longer imports mcpToolRegistry.ts or mcpToolCallRouter.ts
Client-facing stdio server delegates active behavior to mcpProxyDispatcher.ts
Server contracts describe proxy protocol envelopes, not native Compass tool results

tasks.phase: Phase 4: Installer Wrapping And Runtime Scripts
tasks.title: Create secret-safe MCP config wrapping helper
acceptanceCriteria: Wraps one existing local MCP server config into a Compass proxy entry
Preserves env references and cwd/args for downstream startup
Redacts secret-like values from previews, errors, and dry-run output

tasks.phase: Phase 4: Installer Wrapping And Runtime Scripts
tasks.title: Update OpenCode MCP installer to wrap downstream stdio servers
acceptanceCriteria: Installer exposes Compass as the only client-facing MCP server
Original downstream command is passed to Compass proxy without copying raw secrets
Dry-run output shows redacted wrapped config and one-downstream limitations

tasks.phase: Phase 4: Installer Wrapping And Runtime Scripts
tasks.title: Update package scripts for proxy-only MCP runtime
acceptanceCriteria: mcp runtime script starts the proxy-only stdio server with downstream config inputs
No script advertises a native Compass MCP tool server as the active architecture
Existing install script name remains usable if compatible with proxy wrapping

tasks.phase: Phase 5: Native MCP Retirement And Final Verification
tasks.title: Delete or retire native MCP registry, router, executor, and native tool contracts
acceptanceCriteria: Files are deleted when no active import remains, or reduced only to reusable proxy-neutral primitives
No active app/back/shared import depends on native Compass MCP tool names or schemas
Reusable policy, audit, provider, and loadRepoEnv helpers remain decoupled from native MCP contracts

tasks.phase: Phase 5: Native MCP Retirement And Final Verification
tasks.title: Replace native MCP tests with proxy-only tests
acceptanceCriteria: Native registry/router/internal-executor assertions are deleted or rewritten as proxy behavior assertions
Proxy tests cover downstream listing, allow/deny forwarding, fail-closed paths, native tool absence, and secret-safe wrapping
No test requires compass_transfer, compass_swap, native helper tools, or hidden native primitives

tasks.phase: Phase 5: Native MCP Retirement And Final Verification
tasks.title: Run focused and full verification commands and record any follow-up fixes
acceptanceCriteria: Focused proxy tests pass before full suite
Typecheck, lint, and whitespace verification pass
Any implementation checkpoint failure is fixed before moving to the next manual phase
